title: Economic growth and sustainability
paperName: Cambridge International A Level Economics (P3 & P4)
summary: 9708 A Level — GDP growth, LRAS, real vs nominal, and sustainable development with GeoGebra.
learningObjectives: Evaluate supply-side drivers of long-run growth.

simpleExplanation.title: Growing without burning out
simpleExplanation.summary: Actual growth rises when AD increases; potential growth shifts LRAS right. Sustainability considers environmental limits.
steps: LRAS growth from labour, capital, technology.
Negative externalities may offset GDP gains.
Inclusive growth links equity to long-run stability.

sections.content: **Growth and sustainability** (9.2) combines **macro diagrams** with **evaluation**. Use **LRAS shifts** for supply-side growth stories.

sections.label: Mark a growth and sustainability question
